description: Multi-Horizon GSI calibrator -- fits IC + weights at 5/21/63/252-day forward horizons on the same dim-history. Publishes per-horizon weights to SSM /justhodl/gsi/weights/Nd + data/gsi-horizons.json (term structure of stress).

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Multi-Horizon GSI -- weekly Sunday 09:30 UTC, after the canonical 21d calibrator (09:00).
